infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Family Guardian shares your location with your private family circle.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Family Guardian needs background location to keep your family map current.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Family Guardian needs background location to keep your family map current.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Family Guardian connects to your self-hosted server on your local network.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Family Guardian to update your family map in the background.
